title: Heroes of the Hills
writer: William Colt MacDonald, Stanley Roberts, Jack Natteford
actors: Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune
plot: To help relieve overcrowded prison conditions, the Mesquiteers turn their ranch into a work farm. Construction Company man Beaton is hoping for a new prison contract and sets out to see that the experiment is a failure. He lures t...
